queries.question: Show journalists and editors who speak English and Spanish.
queries.sql:
SELECT Journalists.name
FROM Journalists
WHERE Journalists.languages = "English and Spanish"
UNION
SELECT Editors.name
FROM Editors
WHERE Editors.languages = "English and Spanish"
